name: Canadian Cottage Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
Combine crust ingredients and press into a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, then cool.
For the filling: Press cottage cheese through a sieve into a bowl. Add eggs one at a time. Beat in flour and sugar. Stir in lemon rind, juice, and vanilla. Whip cream and fold in. Pour into crust. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes or until set. Cool and chill.
For the topping: Blend berries to puree. Add sugar and cornstarch with orange juice and rind. Cook until thick and clear. Place whole berries over chilled cake. Pour on warm glaze and chill until set.
